hero_desc: Early risk detection through financial education and autonomous support for girls aged 6 to 17.
hero_testimonial: "Anie taught me how to save for my first science kit."
mision_desc: It is a protection ecosystem that uses financial education as a "Trojan horse" to monitor mental health in rural areas, detecting risk patterns before they turn into crises.
feature_anie_desc: An AI chatbot that transforms into your favorite pet to diagnose emotional well-being through digital empathy.
feature_sos_desc: A camouflaged panic button for silent alerts to specialists in imminent risk situations.
feature_casa_desc: A Fintech module where virtual savings empower and evaluate the girl's decision-making.
eco_section_desc: We are not a conventional mental health app. We are a safe environment camouflaged as financial progress.
eco_skeleton_desc: Biometric visualization for specialists that translates interactions into physical and emotional health indicators.
demo_subtitle: Test invisible risk detection in real time
chat_welcome: Hi! I'm Anie. How was your day? Tell me anything, we are safe here.
join_subtitle: Want to be part of SAYANI?
join_desc: We are looking for strategic partners, health specialists, and organizations wishing to implement this ecosystem in rural communities of the Amazon and the Andes.
contact_location: Lima, Peru (Rural Operations in Loreto and Cusco)
footer_desc: Empowering rural childhood through ethical technology and human-centered artificial intelligence.
footer_copy: © 2026 Qalia Health-Tech • Sayani Protegidas • 8M Builder Journey Project
